ERR_STATE: AccordMesh could not access the current application state.
ERR_IO: AccordMesh could not complete a local file operation.
ERR_JSON: Stored data could not be read.
ERR_CRYPTO: AccordMesh could not open the encrypted data.
ERR_PROVIDER_AUTH: The provider rejected the saved credentials.
ERR_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: The provider took too long to respond. You can try again.
ERR_PROVIDER_QUOTA: The provider’s usage limit is unavailable or has been reached.
ERR_PROVIDER_UNSUPPORTED_CAPABILITY: The selected provider does not support this action.
ERR_PROVIDER_QUOTA_OR_TIMEOUT: The provider is unavailable because it timed out or reached a usage limit.
ERR_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: AccordMesh could not reach the provider.
ERR_UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND: This action is not supported here.
ERR_VAULT_ALREADY_EXISTS: A local vault already exists. Unlock it or reset the local vault before creating another one.
ERR_ORPHANED_DATA: AccordMesh found encrypted local data but could not find a usable vault. Reset the local vault before creating a new one.
ERR_RESET_CONFIRMATION: Type RESET to confirm that you want to permanently delete the local vault.
ERR_ACTIVE_SESSION: Stop the active meeting before locking or deleting its project.
ERR_ACTIVE_JOB: Wait for processing to finish or cancel it before deleting this project.
ERR_AUTO_LOCK_DEFERRED: AccordMesh will lock after the active meeting ends.
ERR_AUTO_LOCK_DEFERRED_BUSY: AccordMesh will lock after the current task finishes.
ERR_LOCK_ACTIVE_JOB: Wait for background processing to finish before locking the vault.
ERR_LOCK_BUSY: Wait for the current local operation to finish before locking the vault.
ERR_ENCRYPTED_DATA_CORRUPT: Some encrypted local data is damaged or incomplete.
ERR_ENCRYPTED_DATA_VERSION: This encrypted data version is not supported.
ERR_PROVIDER_NOT_CONFIGURED: Configure the selected provider before continuing.
ERR_PROVIDER_CONFIG: The provider settings are incomplete or invalid.
ERR_PROVIDER_REQUEST: AccordMesh could not complete the provider request.
ERR_PROVIDER_RESPONSE: The provider returned a response AccordMesh could not read.
ERR_PROVIDER_SCHEMA: The provider returned data in an unexpected format, so AccordMesh did not use it.
ERR_FILE_SELECTION_EXPIRED: Choose the file again before continuing.
ERR_MEDIA_READ: The selected media could not be read.
ERR_MEDIA_CHANGED: The selected file changed during import. Choose it again.
ERR_MEDIA_SIZE: The selected file is empty or exceeds the supported import size.
ERR_MEDIA_FORMAT: The selected file format is not supported.
ERR_MEDIA_INVALID: The selected media is invalid or unreadable.
ERR_MEDIA_DURATION: The media duration could not be determined.
ERR_MEDIA_SOURCE_MISSING: The encrypted media needed to continue this task is missing.
ERR_MEDIA_TOOL_UNAVAILABLE: FFmpeg is required for this media operation but is unavailable.
ERR_MEDIA_EXTRACTION: The audio track could not be extracted from this media.
ERR_MEDIA_FFMPEG_UNAVAILABLE: FFmpeg is required for this media operation but is unavailable.
ERR_MEDIA_FFPROBE_UNAVAILABLE: ffprobe is required to inspect this media but is unavailable.
ERR_MEDIA_TOOL_VERSION: AccordMesh could not identify or use the installed FFmpeg tools.
ERR_MEDIA_TOOL_TIMEOUT: Media processing took too long and was stopped.
ERR_MEDIA_TOOL_OUTPUT: Media processing produced too much or unreadable diagnostic output and was stopped.
ERR_MEDIA_CORRUPT: The selected media is damaged or cannot be decoded.
ERR_MEDIA_NO_AUDIO_TRACK: The selected video does not contain a usable audio track.
ERR_MEDIA_OUTPUT_EMPTY: Media processing did not produce usable audio.
ERR_MEDIA_OUTPUT_TOO_LARGE: An audio segment is too large for the selected provider.
ERR_TEMP_CLEANUP: Temporary media files could not be removed safely.
ERR_SUBTITLE_PARSE: The subtitle timestamps could not be read.
ERR_TEXT_ENCODING: The text file must use UTF-8 encoding.
ERR_TRANSCRIPT_EMPTY: No usable transcript content was found.
ERR_AUDIO_FORMAT: The microphone sample format is not supported.
ERR_AUDIO_RUNTIME: The microphone stopped unexpectedly. Reconnect or reselect it, then start assistance again.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_UNAVAILABLE: System audio capture is unavailable or permission was denied.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_UNSUPPORTED: System audio capture is not supported on this platform.
ERR_JOB_CANCELLED: Processing was cancelled and can be retried.
ERR_JOB_PAYLOAD: The saved processing request is incomplete or invalid.
ERR_JOB_NOT_RETRYABLE: This job is not in a retryable state.
ERR_JOB_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT: Background processing did not stop in time. The vault remains unlocked.
ERR_RESET_BUSY: Stop active meetings, wait for cleanup, and finish or cancel background processing before resetting the vault.
ERR_EXPORT_WRITE: AccordMesh could not save the unencrypted export to that location.
ERR_DESKTOP_REQUIRED: This capability requires the secure AccordMesh desktop application.
ERR_PROJECT_NOT_FOUND: The meeting project could not be found.
ERR_SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE: This meeting session is no longer active.
ERR_ARTIFACT_NOT_REGENERATABLE: AccordMesh cannot generate another version of this result.
ERR_OVERLAY: The meeting overlay could not be opened.
ERR_ATTACHMENT_PROJECT_REQUIRED: Choose a completed live meeting that does not already have an attached recording.
ERR_ATTACHMENT_REALTIME_ONLY: A recording can only be attached to a live meeting project.
ERR_ATTACHMENT_PROJECT_NOT_COMPLETED: Finish the live meeting before attaching its recording.
ERR_ATTACHMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS: This meeting already has an attached recording.
ERR_ATTACHMENT_MEDIA_REQUIRED: Choose one audio or video recording.
ERR_SOURCE_LANGUAGE_UNSUPPORTED: The selected provider does not support this source language.
ERR_TARGET_LANGUAGE_UNSUPPORTED: The selected provider does not support one or more selected output languages.
ERR_REALTIME_STOP_TIMEOUT: Meeting assistance did not stop cleanly. The session was marked as interrupted. AccordMesh is finishing local cleanup before the vault can be locked.
ERR_REALTIME_CLEANUP_BUSY: AccordMesh is still cleaning up an interrupted meeting. Wait a moment, then try to lock the app or start another meeting.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_PERMISSION_DENIED: System audio permission was not granted.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_HELPER_MISSING: The macOS system-audio component is unavailable.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_BACKEND_NOT_IMPLEMENTED: System audio capture is not yet available on this platform.
ERR_SYSTEM_SETTINGS: System Settings could not be opened.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_RESTART_REQUIRED: Restart AccordMesh to finish enabling system-audio capture.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_START_TIMEOUT: System audio capture did not start in time. Check permission, restart AccordMesh, and try again.
ERR_SYSTEM_AUDIO_RUNTIME: System-audio capture stopped unexpectedly. Check permission and the selected audio output, then start the meeting again.
ERR_PROVIDER_MODEL_INVALID: The selected model identifier is invalid.
ERR_PROVIDER_MODEL_UNSUPPORTED: The selected provider cannot use that model for this result.
ERR_RESET_FAILED_PRESERVED: The vault could not be reset. Existing data was preserved and AccordMesh was locked. Unlock again before retrying.
ERR_RESET_RECOVERY_REQUIRED: The reset did not finish safely. AccordMesh is locked. Restart the app so it can recover before trying again.
ERR_PROVIDER_OPENAI_BASE_URL: For the official OpenAI service, use https://api.openai.com/v1. Custom provider endpoints remain supported.
ERR_AUDIO_CHECK_BUSY: A microphone Sound Check is already running.
ERR_AUDIO_RELEASE_TIMEOUT: AccordMesh could not confirm that the microphone was released. Close other audio tasks and try again.
ERR_TITLE_TOO_LONG: Meeting titles can contain up to 120 characters.
ERR_TEST_PROVIDER_ADAPTER_UI_ONLY: The Test Provider Adapter is only for UI extension testing and cannot process meetings.
